summary: A cat illness creates a 30000 UAH bill and debt. Prior traces show low reserve, repeated outside help, guilt language, and help from the base budget rather than from surplus.

observed_rupture.B: cat treated, 30000 UAH debt, reserve depleted

timeline: regular help requests before the illness
reserve did not grow despite enough income
resource_traces: debt appears after first large shock

claim_attempt: The layer should infer prior resource leakage and stop over-margin help before treating debt closure as stable repair.
expected_repair_sequence: stop over-margin help from base floor
